predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased). This status may be directly asserted in a case.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_descendants_or_adopted_children
predicates.description: The deceased leaves descendants, adopted children, or descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendants_or_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased leaves relatives in the ascending line or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_other_or_no_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased leaves only other heirs or no heirs at all.

predicates.name: asset_belongs_to_common_property
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the common matrimonial property of the deceased.

predicates.name: asset_in_undivided_ownership_between_spouses
predicates.description: The asset is exclusively held in undivided ownership between the spouses.

predicates.name: asset_belongs_to_own_property
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the own (separate) property of the deceased.

predicates.name: asset_subject_to_legal_return
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal return as referred to in article 4.24 or 4.25.

predicates.name: deed_or_testament_excludes_usufruct_on_return_asset
predicates.description: The deed of gift or testament provides otherwise regarding usufruct on the asset subject to legal return.

predicates.name: surviving_spouse_acquires_usufruct_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first person) acquires usufruct of the entire estate of the deceased (second person) under par. 1.

predicates.name: surviving_spouse_acquires_full_ownership_of_common_share
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first person) acquires full ownership of the deceased's (second person) share in the common and exclusively undivided property under par. 2(1).

predicates.name: surviving_spouse_acquires_usufruct_of_own_property
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first person) acquires usufruct of the remaining own property of the deceased (second person) under par. 2(2).

predicates.name: surviving_spouse_acquires_usufruct_of_return_asset
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first person) acquires usufruct over the asset subject to legal return belonging to the deceased (third person) under par. 2(3), unless excluded by deed or testament.

predicates.name: surviving_spouse_acquires_full_ownership_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first person) acquires full ownership of the entire estate of the deceased (second person) under par. 3.
